title: Not Lonely Farmer
description: Farming and family life with villagers!
body:
Feel bored about simple MC life？
Try to make friends with villagers and farming!
Even you can find villages underground and sky!
Enjoy village life!

(Notice:Vanllia villagers and modded villagers will both appear in a world,in different villages.But Zombie villager will both become MCAR zombie village.)

This modpack is a leisurely modpack.

It contains Farmer's delight refabricated and some subsidiary mods,additonal structure mod and some 

Common auxiliary mods.

Grave stones,Elytra Slot,Diggus Maximus(Diggus Maximus jioned in v1.2.0 of this modpack) and Inventory make game more convience

Game discs and Bountiful make game not boring.

Of course,you can add your own things to make this better.Addtionally,I didn't add season mods or thirst mod,I don't want this change minecraft's basic logic

Feel bored?You can also try to visit Twilight Forest.

On 1.2 version of this modpack ,We add some detail mod on it.

Tip:
Config changes:

MCAR(village with vanllia villager generation rate and vanllia zombie village generation rate)

  1.2.0-

  "fractionOfVanillaVillages": 0.1,
  "fractionOfVanillaZombies": 0.1
  
  1.2.1+

  "fractionOfVanillaVillages": 0.2,
  "fractionOfVanillaZombies": 0.5,

  1.3.1+

    "useSmarterDoorAI": true,

Leaves us In peace

  "unknownLeavesOnlyMatchSelf": false,

Keyboard conflicts

They weren't solved by me,because I don't know most players need which function actives through press which button.
YOU'D BETTER change keyboard control to solve them.(MCAR and MiniMap both use "U")

Press "I" to close backpack HUD

If you want to transport this modpack to Chinese Platform,I have a Chinese name for it--"不孤农夫"
